title: Tapeinotes villosa
taxonomy: Tapeinotes villosa belongs to the family Apocynaceae. This plant is a member of the genus Tapeinotes. Tapeinotes villosa is a species of flowering plant, and its classification is further specified within the order Gentianales. The plant is native to tropical Africa and is known for its unique characteristics. Further classification details for Tapeinotes villosa include being a part of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae.
